# Hey Aaron! Marketing

> Web design, local SEO, ads, reviews, and follow-up for local service pros across East Texas â€” served Ă  la carte. Free first year, then $250/mo. No contracts.

Hey Aaron! Marketing serves non-technical service professionals â€” plumbers, electricians, HVAC pros, roofers, handymen, landscapers, cleaners, contractors and more â€” across Livingston, Cleveland, Coldspring, Goodrich, Onalaska, Trinity, Willis, Splendora, Shepherd, Riverside, New Waverly, Panorama Village and the wider East Texas region.

Contact: +1-713-384-8985

## Plans (The Menu)
- [Plans & The Service-Pro Marketing Menu](https://aaron.chat/pricing/): House Special (first year free), $250/mo House Plate, Combo Plates, Ă  la carte services, and Sides.
- [The Get-Found Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/get-found-plate/): Rank Me Localâ„˘ + Local Group Sharingâ„˘ â€” $549/mo (save $99/mo ~15%). The foundational SEO + AI visibility + neighborhood bundle. Requires website managed by Aaron.Chat. (Google Business Profile management is in Review Rocketâ„˘.)
- [The Phone-Ringer Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/phone-ringer-plate/): Facebook Adsâ„˘ + Adwords on Googleâ„˘ + Lead Hustlerâ„˘ â€” $399/mo (save $148/mo ~27%). Most Popular. Direct lead generation.
- [The Regulars Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/regulars-plate/): Review Rocketâ„˘ + Stay In Touchâ„˘ â€” $599/mo (save $99/mo ~14%). Complete reviews + retention engine. Requires website managed by Aaron.Chat.

## Services (Ă€ La Carte)
- [Built For You Websiteâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/built-for-you-website/): Full web marketing engine â€” custom design, Cloudflare hosting, SEO, AI Engine Optimization, monthly blog posts, link building, citations, warm leads (Consent Resolve), product photos. $250/mo or one-time $2,500.
- [Local Group Sharingâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/local-group-sharing/): 2-3 fresh posts per week shared with 10-20 local Facebook groups, town pages, and community boards across your service area. Built for steady neighborhood reach without paid ads. $149/mo or $1,490/yr (2 months free).
- [Rank Me Localâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/rank-me-local/): Complete Local SEO + AI Search Optimizationâ„˘ for Google, Google Maps, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Microsoft Copilot. Includes city/neighborhood pages, schema markup, AEO/GEO, citation monitoring, NAP consistency, monthly content updates, and plain-English reporting. $499/mo. Available exclusively to clients whose website we build or manage.
- [Facebook Adsâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/facebook-ads/): Facebook and Instagram ad management for service pros. You set your monthly ad budget ($2,000-$50,000); we handle strategy, creative, targeting, daily optimization, lead delivery, and reporting. Flat 15% of media spend (from $300/mo to $7,500/mo).
- [Adwords on Googleâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/adwords-on-google/): Google Ads management targeting high-intent local searches. $199/mo.
- [Lead Hustlerâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/lead-hustler/): Fully-managed lead-platform service for service pros. Includes Zoho CRM setup and management, instant lead routing, daily platform optimization, lead-rejection credit recovery, and tracking-number-per-platform â€” for up to 3 platforms (Thumbtack, HomeAdvisor, Angi, Nextdoor, Yelp, Houzz, Service Direct, or others). $499/mo. Add'l platforms $99/mo each.
- [Google Local Services Adsâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/google-local-services-ads/): Fully-managed Google Local Services Ads. Includes account setup, verification assistance (business/insurance/license/background check), Google Guaranteed eligibility, lead quality optimization, lead dispute management (wrong numbers, spam, out-of-area), review growth strategy, call monitoring, service area optimization, and monthly performance reporting. Pricing: $2,000/mo minimum management fee OR 15% of monthly LSA ad spend, capped at $7,500/mo (reached at ~$50K monthly ad spend). Best for plumbers, electricians, HVAC, roofers, pest control, garage door, tree services, restoration, handymen, locksmiths.
- [Review Rocketâ„˘](https://aaron.chat/services/review-rocket/): Get more 5-star reviews + run your full Google Business Profile. Includes complete GBP management (setup, verification, categories, services, photos, hours, weekly posts, Q&A, map-pack optimization), automated review requests (Google, Facebook, SMS, email), 100 postcards every month (design + printing + mailing + tracking), reputation monitoring with negative-review alerts, customer communication automation, referral boost campaigns, and a monthly performance dashboard. $299/mo. Additional postcards: $0.79-$0.59 each at 101-1,000+ volumes.
- [Stay In Touch](https://aaron.chat/services/stay-in-touch/): Email and SMS follow-ups that bring past customers back. $99/mo.
